---
title: "nitrix.stats.ordinal"
generated: true
signature-hash: 8d6d7830ecd2f024
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.stats.ordinal` (signatures only). Replace the
skeletons with authored prose; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5).
`check_reference_staleness.py` flags this page if the underlying
signatures drift from this stub.
:::

## `OrdinalResult` {#OrdinalResult}

*decorated:* `@register_result(children=('coef', 'thresholds', 'cov_coef', 'log_lik'), aux=('n_obs', 'n_classes'))`, `@dataclass(frozen=True)`

```python
class OrdinalResult
```

Per-element ordinal (cumulative-link) fit output.

*TODO: class overview.*

## `ordinal_fit` {#ordinal_fit}

```python
ordinal_fit(Y: Int[Array, 'V N'], X: Float[Array, 'N p'], *, n_classes: int, link: str='logit', n_iter: int=50, ridge: float=1e-08, block: Optional[int]=None) -> OrdinalResult
```

Mass-univariate ordinal regression (cumulative-link / proportional odds).

**Parameters** — *TODO: document each parameter.*

**Returns** — *TODO.*
